name: scroll-boundary-indication
description: Elevation shadow on fixed top or bottom chrome when scrollable content continues past the viewport edge.
notes: overview.png is the annotated pattern board: four states, swipe gestures, shadow dimensions, and Figma CSS snippets on chrome edges.
examples/* holds clean per-state mobile frames (no measurement overlays) — pair with overview.png for full context.
Figma label: Content Indication Effect / Sticky TopBar — not a separate component; a behavioral overlay on nav-bar and bottom navigation.
Top shadow (--after): downward drop shadow on chrome when content is hidden above or list continues below the pinned header.
Bottom shadow (--before): upward drop shadow on chrome when content is hidden below (tab bar, modal footer).
Shadow is suppressed at scroll boundaries and when content does not overflow.
bindMainScrollChrome in apps/web/js/app-mp.js wires overview, payments, account-details, profile, and investment screens; all-bookings uses a dedicated bind with stickyAfter.
